{{ partial "head.html" . }} {{ partial "nav.html" . }}
{{ if not .IsHome }}{{ partial "sidebar.html" . }}{{ end }}
{{ block "main" . }}{{ end }}
{{- /* "On this page" TOC. On by default for any page (incl. section _index pages) with enough headings; set `toc: false` in front matter to hide it. The grid always reserves the right column, so this just fills it. */ -}} {{ $toc := true }} {{ if isset .Params "toc" }}{{ $toc = .Params.toc }}{{ end }} {{ if and (not .IsHome) $toc (gt (len .TableOfContents) 50) }} {{ partial "toc.html" . }} {{ end }}
{{ partial "search.html" . }} {{ partial "footer.html" . }}
